transcript.clean_text: last stage of 2018 pyrenees a tool around the finally City six climbs today among them the classic path to cull des followed by Caldecott shaman before finish on the pond that des Anglais a stage that will be very short and shall therefore be edgy 110 kilometers the race to the Sun although raised on a Sunday that is everything sunny with rain and wind with seven riders bunched within the first 37 seconds of GC the final victory is to be determined on the climbs of nice hinterland Judi Hollifield tries his luck at the front of the race yet just like the day before the French rider experiments a weak moment and leaves Spanish rider FRA lay leading on his own the Spaniard is soon caught up by his two fellow countrymen maxilla and Davi de la Cruz behind a bunch of 23 riders among them yellow jersey holder and main favourites are trying to catch up on Solea the movie star rider extremely dangerous at GC sturdy leaders are giving a hard time to the yellow rider Pluto and past the top of cull des leading by over one minute in the last climb local de Atacama a coalition led by the ISA Gary brothers and tim wellens sets up to get rid of yellow jersey holder simon yates the british rider resists and benefits from the full of coca is a giri who drugs his brother Yan is Aguirre down with him at the front of the race maxilla rights for GC I saw David de la Cruz just like last year he wins the last stage of the race the yellow jersey bunch crosses the finish line 38 seconds later too late for simon yates who loses Pyrenees to maxilla by four seconds maxilla is obviously our man of the day a Spaniard who beats a British rider on the promenade des anglais the rider who won 2015 - de l'avenir rent 6 @ GC 37 seconds behind the leader at the beginning of the last stage he took off over 40 kilometers before the finish an effort that paid off Salah age 24 wins the first stage race of his professional career I didn't think I could win as I had lost quite a lot of time yesterday I know I needed to try it long before finished we talked about it with a team this morning with them it's really a dream come true it's my second professional victory and I'm extremely happy another victory for Davide Lucas who becomes a usual winner on the last stage arriving in Nice maxilla ranks third with the yellow jersey bunch 35 seconds behind the movie star rider wins para nice thanks to the 7 seconds of voters previously achieved maxilla wins the race over simon yates by only 4 seconds the spanish riders achieved a nice group performance at the front of the race also be noted an honourable eight ranking for french alekseeva Yama's you
